prompt: Add tooltips to icons explaining each feature's functionality, using a light-blue background with white text for clarity.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Add descriptive tooltips to all interactive elements and icons present within the mobile UI wireframes. Position each tooltip adjacent to its respective element. The tooltips should feature a light-blue background with white text, and their content should briefly explain the functionality of the element (e.g., 'Select Item', 'Adjust Setting', 'Navigate to Profile', 'Search Bar').
objects: interactive elements (checkboxes, toggle switches, buttons, search bars, circular icons)
